SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
This field is new, starting with the 2023 service year. It is not populated in earlier years.
